title: Romantic multi-slide website with opening message and 2D-to-3D drawing game

requirements.text: Create an opening/landing slide that prominently displays the exact title text: "My beautiful Wifeyyy".

quotes: Create A Website With Opening Page Writen "My beautiful Wifeyyy"

acceptanceCriteria: On first load, the user sees a full-page opening slide.
The opening slide contains the exact text "My beautiful Wifeyyy" (same capitalization and spelling).
The opening slide provides an obvious way to continue to the next slide (e.g., button, arrow, or click/tap prompt).

requirements.text: Implement a multi-slide experience (carousel/story-style) after the opening slide, with multiple slides containing romantic and beautiful lines in English.

quotes: And it should hai multiple Slide With romantic And beautiful Lines written....

acceptanceCriteria: There are multiple (at least 5) romantic text slides in addition to the opening slide.
Users can navigate forward/backward between slides via on-screen controls.
Slide navigation works on desktop and mobile screen sizes.
Each slide displays one or more romantic lines with clear readability (sufficient contrast, consistent typography).

requirements.text: Add a final slide that contains a mini-game: the user draws a 2D shape, and the app converts it into a corresponding 3D figure rendered on the page.

quotes: And On last slide add a Game in which User draw a 2d shape and it will change it into 3d figure

acceptanceCriteria: The last slide includes a 2D drawing area where the user can draw a closed shape (mouse and touch supported).
A clear action (e.g., "Convert to 3D") generates a 3D model from the drawn 2D shape.
The generated 3D figure is visible in the UI and can be rotated (drag to orbit) and zoomed (or have simple preset camera controls).
The user can reset/clear the drawing and generate a new 3D figure without reloading the page.

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive, romantic visual theme across all slides (colors, typography, spacing, backgrounds, and transitions) with a distinct style that is consistent throughout the site (avoid blue/purple as the primary palette).
acceptanceCriteria: All slides share a consistent design system (matching fonts, button styles, spacing).
Transitions between slides feel intentional (e.g., fade/slide) and match the theme.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; theme reads clearly as romantic and elegant.

requirements.text: Add the required generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI as background/decoration consistent with the romantic theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist at frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filenames specified in imageRequirements.required.
At least one generated image is visibly used in the opening slide or overall background design.
Images are loaded directly as static assets (not via backend endpoints).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose these components instead).
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts or frontend/src/main.tsx (immutable paths).
Do not introduce external databases or third-party authentication; keep the app self-contained using the provided template stack.
nonGoals: User accounts, login, or Internet Identity integration.
Saving or sharing drawings/models to other users.
Importing external 3D models from third-party services.

required: Romantic abstract background with soft warm gradients and subtle bokeh lights (romantic-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Delicate line-art heart and floral motif, transparent background (heart-floral-motif.dim_1024x1024.png)
Small set of minimal romantic UI icons (arrow/next/prev) in a cohesive style, transparent background (romantic-icons.dim_512x512.png)
